task_description: Add Workspace ID support across the application. Every object (node, edge, group, pin, image) created within a workspace should store the workspaceId of its parent workspace. This establishes clear ownership relationships, supports workspace duplication with proper ID reassignment, and ensures import/export preserves these relationships. Includes a migration layer for backward compatibility with existing data.

verification.summary: npm run build completes successfully. No test framework exists - build verification is the primary check. Semantic review APPROVED after 3 iterations.
